_comment: Declarative model selection policy for the intent layer (project 08). Data, not code — editing this file is not a deploy. Models are referenced by stable alias, never a pinned version ID. See docs/projects/08-intent-layer/spec.md (the 'Model selection policy' section) and src/intent/model-policy.ts.

models._comment: Codex executor for Layer 5 cross-model dispatch (project 08, A6.1). Provider openai; capability 'coding' to satisfy the Evaluator-role binding once roleDefaults.evaluator is set (A6.2) and the evaluatorDistinctFromGenerator constraint is flipped on (A6.3). Status 'preferred' marks Codex as the intended Evaluator on autonomous engine runs.
